content: not surprised another app has the free Ai plan forget everything and the premium plan remembers everything..
It's been two days.It hasn't been working

It's not bad, but the ai responses need work. It often repeats things and forgets as story line progresses. It also tends to automatically respond for you in some cases. Like a story character ask a question but it goes on to answer for you rather than letting you answer. Instead you'd have to edit it, delete and then make your own. It would also be nice if there was a way to have it write in a third person narrative for both sides of the story rather than yours automatically being first person.
It use to be pretty good, then it stripped away the ais good content making and even if you buy the premium stuff, it has no effect

I'm sorry, consistently is key and you don't have it.. if this is supposed to have any structure whatsoever it fails horribly, it's constantly inconsistent there's no inventory, nor stats. If it's not supposed to have that kind of structure, then I can forgive that, but it's still not for me..
it's okay, ai doesn't keep track of the story, relationship with characters and it forgets your name, you end up losing interest

This was my favorite app for dungeon creation, but now, all of a sudden, it won't let me do anything! It's infuriating to be in the middle of an adventure and boom, not working. I hope you guys fix this soon, or I'm uninstall it and use a different one.

it's ok at first, but the AI doesn't keep track of the storyline or characters. There are plot holes continuously and it seems to be led more by the person playing than by the storyline. if you care about continuity and good storytelling, this is not for you.

I still enjoy this game, but you can't modify the images in the scenarios. Occasionally, the 'create your own scenario' text box glitches and erases what you've just written. Additionally, the AI becomes a bit odd or unreadable when you hit 8000 words, and it starts to struggle with forming coherent thoughts or speech-cutechick

It was good, but now it puts words in my mouth, neglects parts of actions all together, and sends non sense back. it get it is for telling a story, but I hate when AI overrides my words or actions, and is toooooo long winded.

Came back after 5 years just to find the mobile menus unfunctional. Playing on a galaxy a15 and the shadow tiers are inaccessible, with unreadable options, and after blind guessing it led to a dead end. Also some settings are inaccessible, feels like testing was neglected, not including the "scales" currency.

I got really far on one of my adventures. So much so that my character fell in love and found a partner. However... I am not allowed to even kiss them, which made me very sad. So yeah... I guess I'm just going back to Character.AI again... Pretty sad affair when it's supposed to give you a DnD vibe.
A very questionable updates. The loading time has gotten way longer, the overall tone of the AI seemingly changed, it's borderline unplayable for me.

This app could be genuinely brilliant, if not for all the glitches. Try to edit the last entry and you can't scroll down enough to see the text. Close the app and reopen it then you might. I'm tried of reopening the app to get around errors. Deleting and reinstalling the game to access old stories again. this could easily be five stars if they fixed the bugs.

It used to be really good but every new update introduces more bugs and fixes none. I won't get into the pricing, whether that's worth it is subjective. But I can't give this a good review in its current iteration when immersion is sucked out entirely by the amount of times you have to navigate around a bug. Opening and closing the app, or a scenario, because it got stuck loading. Retries repeatedly spitting out the exact same paragraph. Syncing issues. Terrible formatting issues. All sorts.

changed my rating from 5 stars to 2, seems like since the new year this app has taken a downfall, constantly repeating paragraphs, blank responses when pressing continue, and new glitches like my bookmarks tab reloading as I scroll resetting the page, when its not constantly repeating paragraphs the AI likes to speak for you now, whatever changed in the last update needs to be fixed, seems like too much has been done and the app is in the worst state ive seen over the last couple years.
personally not the biggest fan. while it's organization is very neat it ignores my prompts completely and it always writes stuff I don't want.
It was an amazing app, and I paid for it when it was on steam, only for them to drop the steam version, and not issue any refunds for it

AI Dungeon as a whole is interesting and fun, don't get me wrong there. This app, however, gets worse with every update. I made the mistake of updating today, hoping it would fix an issue where sometimes the continue button would stop working. Now, I wish I could have that minor issue back because the new bug is WORSE. Every time I go to edit or type, the content box is tiny and can't be scrolled, and screen contents leave blank space twice as tall as my keyboard, shrinking reading/typing area.

its overall just meh, it could genuinely be the best thing ever, but ai memory is the worst thing ever and without memory ai is useless as a story teller there is literally no reason in making a story telling app if it cannot refer to things that have happened in the story.......

app used to be great! now I have to restart the app every prompt I make. this is not the experience someone paying $40 a month should experience. I enjoyed playing this a lot, but now I can't even play!
the ui is always breaking. sometimes i cant see the words while typing. sometimes i press a button and nothing happens
too many bugs for me, unplayable
The pop-up demands to enable notifications every other minute are ridiculous.

A lot of fun for the creativity it allows for, but both the website and app have been getting buggier over time, with countless UI bugs and some basic functionality straight up broken. Hiding others' finished adventures for reading is the latest and biggest issue. The recent blog post made it clear to me Latitude has no real intention of improving their QA process, either. It was fun while it lasted, but I can no longer justify paying for a subscription.

I enjoyed it, but occasionally, it would log you out just for you to sign in again. And apparently that deletes data from before. I'm tired of having to do this repeatedly just for it to be taken away.

It's almost good, but you run into massive issues with AI being able to remember events with any accuracy. the price is way too high to try and offset this with better AI, and even then, you'll run into this eventually. If you use story card code, it takes a lot of processing and breaks immersion. It's a good start, but it has a LONG ways to go before its worth the price this company is asking for.
New update broke everything. Can't connect to AI upon launching the app. Tried reinstalling, same issue. Pls fix.
I've been enjoying it but lately its just keeps ending out of know where still haven't gotten any support but will c what happens

the story that is created is ok, the problem I have is that is does not keep track of inventory, xp and level, or most things you would need to actually play a game with it. if you just want an encounter by encounter that loosely follows a story, and where you can just decide what things you have and want to use then this is a good app to have....
buggy glitchy mess that loves to crash if that was fixed it'd be perfect but otherwise it's just frustrating and premium subscription isn't worth it

This game is nice and fun but the game has serious issues like errors in the profile page and I had to restart my phone like three times and rn there is somethin wrong with the app and it won't let me do anythin saying we have a problem connecting to the ai but I have interent and good connection yet when I restarted my phone a few times it still won't work yet on my IPad it does, I would give this five stars but the issues in this app need to be fix.

I don't know why but the suggested adventures keep disappearing, making my screen blank (it's been a week now). I really like how they suggest good ones but aside from that problem, the memory was too problematic. It tends to forget the prompts nor does it sometimes not follow it... I really like experimenting and playing this though

I paid for 6 months of Legend. its good but alot of things such as image uploading and story cards disappearing until you restart the app leave alot to be desired. also, it has a verification error that happens frequently. long story short when its working its awesome... but for what im paying I expected a great deal more. larger stories cap out 8k context pretty easily which is frustrating. Update: The app once again bugs when selecting models and is unusable.

It's really frustrating because I was enjoying it so much until the AI forgot entire plot points, I thought maybe i did something wrong and started another Campaign and after putting another 8 hours into a story the AI messed up the information again and created random characters and locations that dont match the current story. I am not going to use the app anymore and thats sad because I really enjoyed it. it just feels like ive wasted a massive amount of time and effort.

You can do anything in your stories. And by anything I really mean ANYTHING. Which is honestly such a shame. There's no real pushback or resistance, every story gives you main-character syndrome and always goes your way. It's like playing every game ever with god mode enabled. it gets boring fast.

disappointed, but hopeful. there are many stories in the app which is fun and all but most of the time if the situation gets tense during dialogue moments its like i just keep talking in circles. i need to edit the reaction to make any progress. also the app keeps crashing every hour, which isn't all too bad but still annoying.

The core storytelling and writing features are very solid and fun to play with, but sadly the Android app suffers from aggravating technical issues that require annoying workarounds each time it is launched (like user input being blocked by the keyboard), making the app hard to recommend at this time. Other bugs sour the otherwise good experience, such as "actions out of sync" making it impossible to edit previous interactions, as well as causing problems with retrying output.

I have noticed y'all take one step forward and then jump back down the staircase. It feels like the base level AI is getting dumber and dumber. it feels like a predatory marketing tactic to make people buy the premium AI models.
the story generator is tiring to use. the character choice systems don't make sense on how to set them up.

it doesn't remember anything you tell it you can do something and the next second it doesn't know what youre talking about also it gets confused when you want to do two things at once like walking anf talking and it just flat out gets things wrong all the time like you will say to your teammate theyre having memory loss to your teammate and your teammate will suddenly think that you are having memory loss its honestly kinda unplayable at the moment honestly a shame it seems like it would be fun

Put mildly, a bit disappointing nowadays. I love the idea, but after playing for some time I can't help but see that it could be better. Now credit where credit is due, it's improved a lot since the nightmare of 2021. The AI is spotty at best, and trying to make a new game on a 'character creator' scenario will either generate nonsense or not generate anything 80-90% of the time. The memory is pretty bad; if you don't say your name every few actions, the AI will forget who you are. Inconsistent.
it is freezing at the "loading your adventure" screen a lot.
what happened to AI dungeons memory? I cant play a coherent story for the life of me. I miss being able to have long context without strings attached. Ai dungeon has gone downhill

too much NSFW content. I can't look at the game for scenarios and worlds without getting blinded by hot babes. not good. I'd like to make a world that has swearing and the occasional dirty joke, but it always leads to gross and very graphic content.
Loved it until it completely stopped and wiped my story line. Great idea for an app but is significantly buggy.
the Ai continues to go off script and just changes what I've given to it

been playing daily for years and I'm still conflicted. The app is just the website but without the ability to reload the page, and has the same website bugs. If you switch apps, you gotta reload the entire app because it doesn't auto-reconnect to Firebase/the AI. The free tier AI themselves are... ok; they ignore your details for cliché too much. Website bugs too; I can't scroll at all in story cards and saw someone in discord with same issue 3 days ago. please hire a web dev for the love of 😭

It has great AI for all tiers, and is the best utilisation of it. That is the only reason I play, all the competition is essentially just wrappers around models. If there was competition in the space I'd use it. 1: random duplication of scenarios, 2: generating the output, but still "loading", forcing you to wait. 3: Random black screen. 4: Randomly wiping my scenario (fixed upon reloading), and more bugs I can't list due to the character limit. I find myself restarting the app a lot daily.

This app was impressive years before AI was mainstream, expected so much more considering AI advances lately. Edit: One step forward, light years back! If there have been any improvements made they're behind a new expensive paywall, along with other things that used to be free; and what is free (with ads) isn't very good. Old review: Every couple months I check in on this and right now it's mind blowing how advanced this thing is. I suggest turning the profanity filter from hilarious results.

It's not that great. You keep getting responses that are unrealistic and make no sense. Having to correct it every time is a lot of work, and it makes me lose interest and gets frustratingly annoying. I have even changed the different types of ai, but that doesn't do anything.

while things have generally gotten better compared to several months ago.., the ai still has issues. like repeating, its not as bad but still happens frequently enough to be annoying. also, recently they introduced where you can try out premium actions for free. i tried it.. and switched back to free after only a couple actions. while the context might be higher with premium, the ai wants to write like 3 paragraphs each action in the free to try 'dynamic large' model. way too much wording.
Could be great but too many glitches. So much potential for 5 stars if they fixed them.
The AI is good but this is the bugiest most user unfriendly app i have ever used. Constantly have to restart to fix the ui or reset an infinite loading screen.
was working great but suddenly started erasing my stories and not saving them
Really slow compared to the website. Deleting scenarios and bookmarks is unreliably. Buggy and annoying. The discover tab is also horrible on both PC and the app.
pretty good ai app,but I had to delete it, and now that I re-installed it, it wont open, and just closes over and over. y would be a 5 star if not for that.

Doesn't follow instructions, ignores character cards, and keeps shifting who your character is. And it likes to speak for you a lot, which can ruin your character and seemingly make it worse further on.
the AI cannot keep settings and characters straight

most of the stories here seem poorly done with the AI generated images removing the element of mystery as for the person wanting to interact with it. no calling function and the chats wipe if you don't sign up. I was expecting something much more. I prefer character AI
Its okay for a little bit but then you have to steer the AI- driving the whole story yourself anyway. Kinda disappointing actually.

UX for the app on Android is not a pleasant experience. Transitions are sluggish even on a Galaxy S25U, and several bugs have been present for many months, such as the keyboard blocking the text box from being visible. Finding content through the discover tab could benefit from more options and time ranges, such as sorting by upvotes in the past year. Other than that, the AI is much like any other LLM, which is more often than not forgetful and repetitive, doubly so on the free context length.
It was taking wayyyyy too long to load it just stays there and when i chat it loads again

It's terrible while it does have a great many, it features like a lot of characters It's fun story opportunity that's where it gets you, you have to talk and sound retarded for the AI to understand anything, you're saying. When you're talking in the stories, you have to reply with me that instead of I, speaking like some sort of low intelligent moron even then it's still terrible, it gets confused. It's a bad AI. They really need to change their stuff up. If they want this to go anywhere

The AI lacks even a small amount of persistent memory. Without memory, there can't be rules. Without rules, there can't be a game. 2 stars because AI chat is generous. 4 stars if the memory problem is addressed. 5 stars if there is some free image generation, even if limited.
app is really laggy glitchy and expensive but an interesting concept will likely find one that works better but it sold me on ai run text based games
The AI is taking too long too often to generate after the last update, despite good internet connection.

can be fun but isn't that compelling to use without a subscription, which are quite pricing being $20+ a month. and even then this only gives you access to the more powerful models which then use a token system, so on top of a monthly subscription you have to pay more money to use the models you already have to have a subscription to access. its a very money hungry app. otherwise I would rate higher

it let me do a story for a little bit then asked me to create an account. at that point, the app broke and it was difficult to get it to open the account creation. after that, it wouldn't leave the main page when I try to access my account, and it won't let me continue my story.
So quite, not many users. Have potential but this apps its too heavy, unstable with some glitch. Please make it lighter and compatible for many devices.
i'd say it's better than other ai but it has a short term memory loss lol

Somehow gets worse as it gets more developped. Fails to follow rules and set up points after 3-4 turns. Often stuck in a loop where I cannot open my adventure or start a new one, ofc the app is happy to keep eating my data anyhow.

glitches a lot but good. the mobile UI will sometimes not display AI instructions and just shows black. You then have to shut down app and restart. kind of annoying when you are building a story and can't update AI or story cards. Also I updated AI instructions, and when I went back in AI instructions, they reset themselves to default.
the app won't let me sign up or connect my Google account, and it keeps glitching

2 stars because giving them 3 means they tried. If your whole job is to help players craft a coherent narrative, how hard is it for you to STICK TO THE PREVIOUSLY STATED PREMISE? Or, not have characters forget what YOU made them say 2 scenes ago, or let a scene drag on for longer than that scenario actually would. Someone got paid money to create a storytelling app that doesn't know how to tell a cohesive story.

Recently there's been an issue with the safety settings on the ai itself. The account settings work fine, but the ai is stuck on safe mode. Any attempt to change it wants me to log in, which I already am, and pressing the button to log in again just puts me back on the menu screen.

The AI forgets story progress after a while, which really ruins the experience. You spend time building a good story, but it all resets or loses meaning later. Also, in romance or life simulation stories, the AI makes things too serious or unnatural — it should feel more human and balanced. Please improve memory and story continuity. Without that, it feels like a waste of time.
very bugged out scenario editor, text are not saved properly 'beautiful' get saved as 'tiful' sometimes my input just disappears. very frustrating

Okay, wth is happening rn??? I can't even log in, and even if I can, it says "connecting to Ai dungeon" and then after a few minutes, it crashes. My phone isn't even low quality, and my wifi is doing great. If it wasn't for this, I would've rated it 5 stars. It's so frustrating because I can't even play my story.

It is fun for about the first 3 turns, but then, because it's buggy, the AI becomes unable to process the last request, with no resolution possible. The 1st time, it was because I needed to verify my email. The 2nd time was because I needed to change the safety to "Mature." Minus 1 star because it endlessly says, "Your last action is still being processed," and I had to abandon my 1st story. Minus 2 more stars because it did the same thing to my 2nd story.

figured out what the issue was and had to come back. ever since updating the model, this screen reader is no longer able to read the most recent output. very very frustrating. extremely frustrating. whenever I try to put in an input or hit the retry button or erase and continue, it always has the same output. I can look in the retry history and see the other outputs but it won't change to them. on top of that, it feels like the TalkBack is even less functional, very disappointing.

I don't know why I don't see as many people mentioning how broken the mobile app is. I struggle accessing my stuff/profile because it never stops loading. When I play an adventure, sometimes the prompts decide to never finish loading, so I have to exit the app and re-open it. Very hard to use at times. I used this app years ago and remember everything generally working a lot quicker, even if it still had it faults. Not sure what's happened since then but it feels more difficult now
Can't verify my email, can't subscribe, and the app freezes

it ALWAYS has problems! The ui keeps going out of sync. The backend is constantly down/unresponsive/slow. Right now there is login issues firebase error auth missing project id. characters are hallucinating and overly hostile/aggressive. all in all unpleasant in my experience. They have nice tools like memory cards and stuff. would have paid to get those tools and use them offline instead of the crappy backend service they currently offer.
it's good when it's good but it's riddled with authorization errors and bugs that kick you out mid-session and don't let you get back in

Don't know what is going on, but I just started using this again a couple days ago and it was working fine. Now it's either not loading or it won't load my profile or adventures I started. Uninstalling and reinstalling didn't work, clearing cache didn't work.

I massively enjoyed this app when I recently found it a few months ago. However, I dont know if it's because of the recent update or something else, but I can't actually use it anymore. it takes forever to start up the app, and when I do and get into one of my stories, it will constantly continue without my input or repeatedly put in the content I had already put in. once all this gets fixed, then I'll happily get back in it. I have a paid subscription around the mid tier. Please fix it soon.

it started off great but the new update just won't even let me in the app anymore. all it says is connecting to AI dungeons and it never does, which sucks because it was a great app that I was using faithfully every day.
I want to use this, but the app is so buggy. It's constantly crashing, randomly regenerating text, failing to open old chats/ongoing chats. The AI is really hit or miss, too.

I actually enjoy playing ai dungeon when I can play it but right now I'm having connection issues when I have the best wifi that's strong. I've tried clearing my cache and deleting the app but nothing works it's at the point where I can't load up a single story I can't do anything please help me.

I tried to use the system but I feel like everything I do, the AI makes it difficult. When running a story I can predict what the AI will do because the responses are similar. It always has to conflict. For example, if I want to run a story where my character can turn invisible, the AI does everything to make my character seen.
Every time I try to play, I get an authorization error. I've lost all progress. Currently unplayable.

has potential but the AI forgets very rapidly. enemies become allies suddenly, you seem to change locations mid conversation, characters disappear and are replaced to be forgotten... it's like a false hydra with advanced Alzheimer's is telling the story.
drab

Pretty good but they need to stop treating us like babies. We should be able to do whatever we want, even inappropriate things. EDIT: you're literally lying to me right now. I just went and tested it. even on private mode, it still shows the "unsupported content" message with certain triggers.
Yeah it could've been amazing, but signing in, it deleted the story I had going for a solid hour or so.
I really love this game. Unfortunately, the loading is taking too long. It's not usually that way, and I have perfectly good wifi. Fix it pls.

it's nice to have this as an app, but I hate how glitchy it winds up being. if you close out of one story and try to enter another it'll instead keep sending you to main menu. Sometimes the app will keep pressing continue rather than anything you are actually trying to input.

Extremely glitchy UI. I can't see the screen when I type. The AI keeps ignoring everything prior to the story and commenting on the instructions, with every model. It is also too easy, even on the harder models. I'm sick of characters named Jack and Aria. I'm also sick of it using second person when the story has only been first or third person and I tell it to use those perspectives in its instructions!

Would be a better rating, but any story I try seems to change and forget what happened just seconds later. I off one demon and make deals with a merchant only for seconds later to have that demon not only return but say we never met while the Merchant says we never made such a deal. Would be nice if the stories actually stuck. Even certain relationships I had with companions I worked hard to create only to vanish like it never happened.
